§7Guide Book #116§r

§lScroll of Flourishing I§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lCraftable on§r: Magic Spells Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lDispensable§r: YES
•§lOffhand equippable§r: YES
•§lCastable with§r: Wands
•§lImpact Hit Damage§r: 2

•§lImpact Area Damage§r: 0
•§lImpact Result§r: Fertilizes most of the fertilizable blocks within a 4-block radius from the center of the impact location.
